# Port target: `eslint-plugin-functional`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-functional` @ `v10.0.0` |
| Baseline npm version | `10.0.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 20 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `functional-parameters` | Enforce functional parameters. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/functional-parameters.md) |
| 2 | `immutable-data` | Enforce treating data as immutable. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/immutable-data.md) |
| 3 | `no-class-inheritance` | Disallow inheritance in classes. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-class-inheritance.md) |
| 4 | `no-classes` | Disallow classes. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-classes.md) |
| 5 | `no-conditional-statements` | Disallow conditional statements. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-conditional-statements.md) |
| 6 | `no-expression-statements` | Disallow expression statements. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-expression-statements.md) |
| 7 | `no-let` | Disallow mutable variables. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-let.md) |
| 8 | `no-loop-statements` | Disallow imperative loops. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-loop-statements.md) |
| 9 | `no-mixed-types` | Restrict types so that only members of the same kind are allowed in them. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-mixed-types.md) |
| 10 | `no-promise-reject` | Disallow rejecting promises. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-promise-reject.md) |
| 11 | `no-return-void` | Disallow functions that don't return anything. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-return-void.md) |
| 12 | `no-this-expressions` | Disallow this access. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-this-expressions.md) |
| 13 | `no-throw-statements` | Disallow throwing exceptions. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-throw-statements.md) |
| 14 | `no-try-statements` | Disallow try-catch[-finally] and try-finally patterns. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/no-try-statements.md) |
| 15 | `prefer-immutable-types` | Require function parameters to be typed as certain immutability | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-immutable-types.md) |
| 16 | `prefer-property-signatures` | Prefer property signatures over method signatures. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-property-signatures.md) |
| 17 | `prefer-readonly-type` | Prefer readonly types over mutable types. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-readonly-type.md) |
| 18 | `prefer-tacit` | Replaces `x => f(x)` with just `f`. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/prefer-tacit.md) |
| 19 | `readonly-type` | Require consistently using either `readonly` keywords or `Readonly<T>` | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/readonly-type.md) |
| 20 | `type-declaration-immutability` | Enforce the immutability of types based on patterns. | [docs](https://github.com/eslint-functional/eslint-plugin-functional/blob/main/docs/rules/type-declaration-immutability.md) |
